products.name: Notion AI
products.tagline: Your connected AI assistant for docs, projects & knowledge
products.description: Notion AI helps you write, brainstorm, edit, summarize, and more — right inside your workspace. It works across your docs, wikis, and projects to save you time and supercharge your productivity.

products.name: Arc Browser 2.0
products.description: Arc is a Chromium-based browser that rethinks how you organize tabs, spaces, and workflows. Version 2.0 brings Boosts, easels, and a command bar that makes browsing feel like a native app.

products.name: Linear 2024
products.description: Linear is a modern project management tool for teams who build products. It combines issue tracking with beautiful design and lightning-fast performance for a seamless developer experience.

products.name: Raycast Pro
products.tagline: Your shortcut to everything on Mac
products.description: Raycast replaces Spotlight with a blazingly fast launcher that lets you control tools, run scripts, and manage tasks. Pro adds AI commands, cloud sync, and team collaboration features.

products.name: Cal.com v4
products.tagline: Open source scheduling for absolutely everyone
products.description: Cal.com is the open-source Calendly alternative. v4 introduces round-robin scheduling, team event types, and a powerful workflow engine — all fully self-hostable and free to use.

products.name: Midjourney V7
products.tagline: Next-gen AI image generation with photorealism
products.description: Midjourney V7 delivers a massive leap in photorealism, coherence, and prompt understanding. Create stunning visuals from text prompts with unprecedented control over style and composition.

products.name: Supabase Studio
products.tagline: The open-source Firebase alternative, now with a visual editor
products.description: Supabase gives you a Postgres database, authentication, storage, and edge functions. Studio adds a beautiful visual editor for building schemas, writing queries, and managing your backend.

products.name: Figma Slides
products.description: Figma Slides brings the power of Figma's design tools to presentations. Create interactive, beautifully animated decks collaboratively — no more exporting static PNGs into boring slide tools.

products.name: Cursor IDE
products.tagline: The AI-first code editor built for pair programming
products.description: Cursor is a fork of VS Code with deep AI integration. It predicts your next edit, answers questions about your codebase, and lets you refactor large files with natural language — all locally and fast.

products.name: Resend
products.tagline: Email API for developers that just works
products.description: Resend is a modern email API built for developers. Send transactional and marketing emails with a beautiful dashboard, React email templates, and best-in-class deliverability out of the box.
